title: poa colensoi
intro: Poa colensoi, also known as Colenso's grass or mountain hair grass, is a species of grass that is native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Poa colensoi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment for any medical condition.
